home.seoTitle: Verified creator PCs and gaming setups
home.seoDescription: A source-first database of PCs, peripherals and streaming equipment used by creators, streamers and esports players.
home.description: PCs, peripherals and streaming gear with dates, evidence levels and honest unknowns. No invented specs, no silently recycled lists.
home.proofText: Every listed item points back to a dated public source and carries a clear confidence label.
home.featuredDescription: Published profiles and the next creators in our verification queue.
home.principlesTitle: A better way to track creator gear
home.principle1Text: Each claim keeps its publisher, check date and original link.
home.principle2Text: Old data stays labeled as old instead of receiving a cosmetic new year.
home.principle3Text: Separate systems and tournament gear are distinguished when sources allow it.
home.ctaTitle: Can you prove a setup change?
home.ctaText: A creator clip, setup tour or public product post is more useful than another copied list.

catalog.seoTitle: Creator PC and streaming setup database
catalog.seoDescription: Browse creator, streamer and esports setups. Filter profiles and see which equipment reports are sourced, dated or still being researched.
catalog.title: Find their setup
catalog.description: Search published gear reports and profiles currently in the verification queue.
catalog.noResultsText: Try a nickname, real name or a broader filter.
catalog.researchNotice: Research profiles are visible for transparency but remain noindex until enough sourced information is available.

profile.equipmentDescription: Models below reflect the cited source and date. They may differ between home, bootcamp and tournament environments.
profile.noEquipmentText: We have not found enough reliable public evidence to publish a component list yet.
profile.sourcesDescription: External sources are shown so you can evaluate the claim yourself. A secondary database is labeled as reported, not confirmed.
profile.affiliateDisclosure: Some future store links may be affiliate links. Product placement never changes the evidence label.
profile.faqPcAnswerKnown: The latest reported configuration is listed above with a source date and evidence status. It is not described as first-party confirmed unless the creator disclosed it directly.
profile.faqPcAnswerUnknown: The current PC is not reliably confirmed. We keep the profile in research instead of publishing a guessed build.
profile.faqFreshAnswer: The page review date and the original source date are shown separately. A new page date never hides an older source.
profile.faqBuyQuestion: Can I build the same PC?
profile.faqBuyAnswer: You can use confirmed or reported parts as a reference, but compatibility, availability and price should be checked before buying. Alternatives will be added separately from the creator's actual gear.

methodology.seoDescription: Our source hierarchy, confidence labels, update policy, corrections process and affiliate rules for creator PC and setup profiles.
methodology.title: Evidence before equipment
methodology.description: A page is useful only when readers can tell what is known, who reported it and when it may have changed.
methodology.sourceIntro: We prefer evidence in this order. Lower tiers can be useful, but they never receive a stronger label than the evidence supports.
methodology.tier1Text: A creator setup tour, public post, channel description or direct statement showing the exact model.
methodology.tier2Text: A clear stream frame, event photo or manufacturer partnership where the product can be identified.
methodology.tier3Text: A specialist database or editorial article with a visible update date. These claims remain reported.
methodology.tier4Text: Forums, copied lists and AI summaries may provide leads, but are not published as equipment facts.
methodology.confirmedText: Direct or unambiguous first-party evidence supports the model.
methodology.reportedText: A dated secondary source lists the model, but we have not independently confirmed it.
methodology.historicalText: The item was valid for an older setup and is not presented as current.
methodology.researchText: The profile exists in the editorial queue but is noindex and contains no speculative list.
methodology.datesText: Every page separates our review date from the source's own date. Updating layout or copy does not reset the evidence clock. Profiles are reviewed after public setup tours, hardware sponsorships and major team changes.
methodology.seoText: Research-only profiles use noindex and are omitted from the sitemap. They become indexable only after they answer the query with meaningful sourced information. Search and filter parameters are also noindex to avoid duplicate pages.
methodology.moneyText: An affiliate relationship may change where a buying link points, but never which item is listed or how certain the claim is. Alternatives and recommendations must remain separate from the creator's reported equipment.
methodology.correctionsText: When stronger evidence contradicts a listing, the profile is updated and the older component can be retained as historical context. Sources are not silently removed merely because they became inconvenient.

footer.description: Creator PCs and gear, documented with sources and dates.
footer.legal: SetupIndex is an independent reference project and is not affiliated with the creators or brands listed.

error.title404: This setup is off the desk
error.text404: The page may have moved, or this creator has not been added yet.
error.textDefault: Please return to the directory and try again.
